summary: Tested all 11 Admin Subscriptions tab fixes. All 11 fixes verified PASS via UI automation + code review. Created test customer (testsub@validation.com) and subscription product (Test Sub Product) to enable end-to-end validation testing.

Fix 1+9 - CustomerSearchableSelect.details: Customer field uses SearchableSelect component (button tag, no datalist elements in DOM). Options filtered to active/non-deleted customers only. Verified via data-testid='manual-sub-customer-email' element check: tag=button, datalist_count=0.

Fix 2 - ProductSearchableSelect.details: Product field uses SearchableSelect component (button tag). Options filtered by !deleted_at && is_active !== false && pricing_type === 'subscription'. Verified via data-testid='manual-sub-product-select' element check: tag=button.

Fix 3 - NegativeAmountValidation.details: Amount input has min=0, step=0.01 (Create dialog). Verified 'Amount cannot be negative' toast error in Edit dialog via JS state override. Code review confirms same validation in handleCreateManual. Both dialogs have the validation.

Fix 4 - StartDateMinToday.details: Start Date input has min=2026-03-12 (today's date). Verified via data-testid='manual-sub-start-date' min attribute check.

Fix 5 - ReminderDaysStep1.details: Renewal Reminder input has step=1, min=1 (Create dialog). Verified 'Renewal Reminder must be a positive whole number (no decimals or negatives)' toast error in Edit dialog with value 1.5. Code review confirms same validation in both dialogs.

Fix 6 - FreshStateOnReopen.details: Opening Create dialog after close resets to EMPTY_MANUAL_SUB state. Verified: amount=0, customer='Select customer...' after close+reopen. Button onClick sets fresh state with freshToday dates.

Fix 7 - ContractEndDateValidation.details: Setting contract end date (2026-03-11) before start date (2026-03-12) in Edit dialog shows 'Contract End date must be later than the Start Date' toast error. Both Create and Edit dialogs have this validation in code.

Fix 8 - RenewalDateValidation.details: Setting renewal date = start date (2026-03-12) in Edit dialog shows 'Renewal Date must be later than the Start Date' toast error. Code review confirms same validation exists in handleCreateManual for Create dialog.

Fix 10 - PlanNameReadonly.details: Edit dialog Plan Name field is a readonly <div> (data-testid='edit-sub-plan-name-readonly'), not an input. Shows 'Plan name is managed via the Products module' hint text. Verified via tag=div check and hint text visibility.

Fix 11 - NotesButtonDialog.details: Notes button has type='button' and stopPropagation. Clicking Notes button opens a Dialog with title 'Subscription Notes' (URL unchanged - no navigation). Shows 'No notes for this subscription.' when empty. Verified via Notes dialog visible check.

critical_code_review_comments: Fix 7 in Create dialog: The contract end date validation (computeExpiryDate) is checked against start_date but since term_months > 0 always adds positive months, this validation can only trigger for same-day edge case (e.g. start=today, 1 month term would give next month - always valid). This is fine by design.

Hydration warning in console: 'In HTML, <tr> cannot be a child of <span>' - this is a non-critical React hydration warning in PartnerSubscriptionsTab that should be investigated and fixed to prevent potential rendering issues.

Fix 3 in Create dialog: The HTML min=0 attribute on number inputs prevents negative values from even being entered/submitted via browser, making the JS validation a redundant belt-and-suspenders check. This is the correct approach.
seed_data_creation: Created test customer testsub@validation.com (user_id: 3be864a1-7fbb-4711-bbb4-f8209e3c3365, customer_id: e34ed109-96ce-4692-8a8c-143235c8faf5) and subscription product 'Test Sub Product' (id: 55e23a3c-88c7-4076-a866-c4cbf1a0418a, pricing_type=subscription) in automate-accounts tenant. Also one test subscription was created during testing (SUB-674168F3).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 Subscriptions tab fixes are working. Admin login: no partner code needed for API login (POST /api/auth/login with email+password only). In UI, use partner code 'automate-accounts' then admin credentials. Subscriptions tab is index 11 in the tab list (button.aa-tab-trigger). Test data created: customer testsub@validation.com, product Test Sub Product (subscription type). One test subscription exists (SUB-674168F3). The platform_super_admin (admin@automateaccounts.local) cannot create customer-role users via admin API - use POST /api/admin/customers/create endpoint instead.
rca_of_issue: N/A - All fixes verified working as expected.
